properties.notes: Applied Materials publicly described TSMC qualification and production use of its gate stack tooling.

sources.label: Applied Materials gate stack qualification at TSMC

properties.notes: Applied states Intel recognized it as an EPIC Outstanding Supplier. This edge maps the relationship into Applied's deposition-tool family used in wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Applied Materials Intel EPIC supplier award release

properties.notes: Synopsys and TSMC publicly describe a long-running certified design-flow collaboration for advanced process and packaging nodes.

sources.label: Synopsys and TSMC partnership page

properties.notes: Synopsys states its digital and analog design flows are certified by Intel Foundry for Intel 18A and that its IP and multi-die flows support Intel Foundry customers.

sources.label: Synopsys and Intel Foundry 18A collaboration release

properties.notes: Intel and Dai Nippon Printing publicly described joint development of advanced photomask technology for Intel microprocessor production, supporting a direct photomask dependency.

sources.label: Intel and Dai Nippon Printing photomask collaboration release

properties.notes: SUMCO publicly states TSMC recognized it for excellent production support in silicon wafer supply, supporting a direct wafer dependency into TSMC's fab flow.

sources.label: SUMCO vision page listing TSMC and Samsung supplier awards

properties.notes: SUMCO publicly states Samsung recognized it with a Best in Value award, and SUMCO's core silicon-wafer business is modeled here as a wafer dependency supporting Samsung semiconductor production.

sources.label: SUMCO vision page listing TSMC and Samsung supplier awards

properties.notes: Siltronic states Intel recognized it for supplying polished and epitaxial silicon wafers that were essential to Intel's success.

sources.label: Siltronic Intel PQS wafer supplier release

properties.notes: TSMC's U.S. expansion announcement identifies Apple as one of the leading technology companies it supports.

sources.label: TSMC U.S. expansion announcement naming key customers

properties.notes: TSMC and MediaTek jointly announced MediaTek's first chip using TSMC's 3nm process.

sources.label: MediaTek and TSMC 3nm announcement

properties.notes: Marvell states it is extending its collaboration with TSMC to develop a 2nm technology platform for Marvell silicon.

sources.label: Marvell and TSMC 2nm platform release

properties.notes: TSMC's U.S. expansion announcement identifies Qualcomm among the technology companies it supports.

sources.label: TSMC U.S. expansion announcement naming key customers

properties.notes: TSMC's U.S. expansion announcement identifies AMD among the technology companies it supports.

sources.label: TSMC U.S. expansion announcement naming key customers

properties.notes: ASE's own filings describe a strategic relationship with TSMC around packaging, testing, and direct shipment services.

sources.label: ASE filing describing strategic relationship with TSMC

properties.notes: TSMC and Amkor publicly describe a coordinated Arizona front-end and back-end flow where chips from the nearby TSMC fab are packaged and tested by Amkor.

sources.label: TSMC and Amkor Arizona packaging collaboration
Amkor Arizona advanced packaging announcement

properties.notes: TSMC's U.S. expansion announcement identifies NVIDIA among the AI and technology innovation companies it supports.

sources.label: TSMC U.S. expansion announcement naming key customers

properties.notes: TSMC's U.S. expansion announcement identifies Broadcom among the companies it supports.

sources.label: TSMC U.S. expansion announcement naming key customers

properties.notes: Soitec states it will deliver 300mm RF-SOI substrates to GlobalFoundries for production on GF's RF-SOI technology platforms.

sources.label: Soitec and GlobalFoundries RF-SOI collaboration release

properties.notes: Toppan and GlobalFoundries state that Toppan will provide GF with photomasks and related services under a multi-year supply agreement.

sources.label: Toppan and GlobalFoundries photomask supply agreement

properties.notes: Toppan Photomasks states TI recognized it with a Supplier Excellence Award, supporting a photomask dependency into TI's semiconductor manufacturing flow.

sources.label: Toppan Photomasks Texas Instruments supplier award release

properties.notes: Arm and MediaTek publicly describe a next-generation mobile and consumer technology partnership built on Arm technology.

sources.label: Arm and MediaTek partnership release

properties.notes: Arm's own filing asserts an active licensing relationship with Qualcomm and Nuvia-derived designs.

sources.label: Arm statement on Qualcomm licensing dispute

properties.notes: KLA states Intel recognized its process-control capital equipment and services, supporting a metrology and inspection dependency into Intel's wafer-fab operations.

sources.label: KLA Intel preferred quality supplier release

properties.notes: ASE and Analog Devices publicly announced a strategic collaboration centered on IC packaging and testing solutions.

sources.label: ASE and Analog Devices strategic collaboration

properties.notes: ASE subsidiary SPIL publicly highlighted close collaboration with NVIDIA around accelerated assembly and test services.

sources.label: SPIL and NVIDIA advanced packaging site visit

properties.notes: Cadence and TSMC publicly describe AI-driven EDA, IP, and 3D-IC enablement on advanced TSMC nodes.

sources.label: Cadence and TSMC advanced-node collaboration release

properties.notes: Tokyo Electron publicly describes repeated TSMC recognition for technology collaboration and contributions to fab operations.

sources.label: Tokyo Electron receives TSMC performance award

properties.notes: Tokyo Electron publicly identifies Intel as a top supplier-program customer relationship through Intel's EPIC award.

sources.label: Tokyo Electron receives Intel EPIC supplier award

properties.notes: Siemens states its Calibre and Solido tools are certified and enabled for Intel Foundry's latest 18A and advanced packaging flows.

sources.label: Siemens and Intel Foundry collaboration release

properties.notes: GlobalFoundries states it has a decade-long partnership with Apple to manufacture wireless connectivity and power management chips.

sources.label: GlobalFoundries and Apple partnership release

properties.notes: GlobalFoundries states it has been manufacturing Qualcomm chips for many years and extended the agreement through 2028 across multiple technologies and sites.

sources.label: GlobalFoundries and Qualcomm long-term agreement release

properties.notes: GlobalFoundries and NXP state that GF will manufacture NXP's 22FDX solutions in Dresden and Malta as part of a next-generation process collaboration.

sources.label: GlobalFoundries and NXP 22FDX collaboration release

properties.notes: Amkor states Apple will be the first and largest customer of its Arizona advanced packaging and test facility.

sources.label: Amkor Arizona advanced packaging announcement

properties.notes: Amkor and Intel publicly describe a strategic EMIB assembly partnership for advanced packaging capacity.

sources.label: Amkor and Intel EMIB packaging partnership

properties.notes: Lam states TSMC recognized it with a technology development award. This edge maps Lam's contribution into the etch-tool family that supports wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Lam Research TSMC technology development award release

properties.notes: Lam states Intel granted it an EPIC Outstanding Supplier Award. This edge models Lam's contribution within the etch-tool family used across Intel's wafer-fab operations.

sources.label: Lam Research Intel EPIC supplier award release

properties.notes: ASML and TSMC publicly described joint investment and lithography roadmap acceleration for EUV and future wafer tooling.

sources.label: ASML and TSMC lithography co-investment announcement

properties.notes: Intel's High-NA EUV press materials explicitly identify ASML as the builder of the production lithography system.

sources.label: Intel High-NA EUV press kit

properties.notes: TOK states TSMC recognized its novel technology collaboration; given TOK's mapped role as a semiconductor materials supplier, this edge is modeled as a photoresist dependency into wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Tokyo Ohka Kogyo TSMC supplier award release

properties.notes: TOK states TI recognized its stable supply of high-quality materials. Given TOK's mapped role in the seed, this edge is modeled as a photoresist/material dependency into TI wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Tokyo Ohka Kogyo Texas Instruments supplier award release

properties.notes: SCREEN states TSMC recognized the reliability of its cleaning systems that were essential to semiconductor device manufacturing and capacity ramp-up.

sources.label: SCREEN TSMC production support award release

properties.notes: Micron and Powertech state PTI will provide Micron with assembly and packaging services under a long-term strategic relationship in Xi'an.

sources.label: Powertech and Micron packaging services release

properties.notes: Entegris states TI recognized its advanced chemistries and stable support for production, which is modeled here as a process-material dependency into TI wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Entegris Texas Instruments supplier award release

properties.notes: Entegris states Intel recognized its contamination control and advanced process materials support. This edge models that support as a process-material dependency into Intel wafer fabrication.

sources.label: Entegris Intel preferred quality supplier release

properties.description: Supplies semiconductor manufacturing equipment.
Semiconductor capital equipment and equipment service activities.
Designs chips but outsources wafer fabrication.
Chip design, EDA, and licensable semiconductor IP activities.
Manufactures wafers for external customers.
Wafer fabrication and front-end semiconductor manufacturing activities.
Provides outsourced semiconductor assembly and test services.
Provides semiconductor packaging or advanced packaging capability.
Provides outsourced semiconductor test services.
Assembly, packaging, and test activities after wafer fabrication.
Integrated device manufacturer with internal fabrication capability.
Provides electronic design automation software.
Supplies process chemicals or wet chemicals used in semiconductor manufacturing.
Process chemicals, gases, targets, slurries, and related material inputs.
Produces memory products such as DRAM or NAND.
Licenses semiconductor IP blocks or cores.
Produces photomasks, mask blanks, or related mask products.
Photomasks, mask blanks, and reticle-adjacent activities.
Produces base wafers or specialty wafers used in chip fabrication.
Silicon wafers, specialty wafers, and package substrate activities.
Supplies specialty or industrial gases used in semiconductor manufacturing.
Produces package substrates or related substrate inputs.
